album.title: you seem pretty sad for a girl so in love [Explicit]

wiki.summary: “stupid song” is the second track and third single from Olivia Rodrigo’s third studio album, you seem pretty sad for a girl so in love. The song finds a deeply in love Rodrigo overwhelmingly infatuated with her lover to the point where words aren’t even enough to capture how she feels. On June 9th, Olivia announced on BBC Radio 1 that “stupid song” would be released as the album’s third single alongside a music video. Prior to this interview, she was spotted filming the music video in Upper Manhattan on May 26th. Read more on Last.fm.
